problem id: 008b52fd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10011001 -> 01001110
  10110101 -> 00010110
  10011101 -> 01000110
  10011110 -> 11000010
  10111000 -> 10001110
  11010000 -> 01011111
  00110001 -> 00011101
  11000111 -> 11110011
  11110001 -> 10011111
  11010001 -> 11011111

query: 00001101
predicted answer: 01100101
